rss.title: Senior IS leader killed in joint operation, US and Nigeria say
rss.snippet: President Donald Trump said the operation eliminated "the most active terrorist in the world", Abu-Bilal al-Minuki.

rss.title: Trump warns Taiwan against declaring independence, hours after summit with China's Xi
rss.snippet: The US president says he wants Beijing and Taipei to "cool down" tensions over the self-governing island.

rss.title: Trump and Xi conclude 'very successful' talks but few deals confirmed
rss.snippet: There were plenty of choreographed ceremonies but no trade breakthroughs after the two-day visit.

arxiv_papers.title: Static and Dynamic Strategies for Influencing Opinions in Social Networks
arxiv_papers.snippet: The ability of a small set of coordinated actors to manipulate opinions in online social networks poses a serious challenge to the fairness and integrity of public debate. We investigate this problem by studying how targeted stubborn agents can shift the average opinion of a network governed by the

arxiv_papers.title: ScioMind: Cognitively Grounded Multi-Agent Social Simulation with Anchoring-Based Belief Dynamics and Dynamic Profiles
arxiv_papers.snippet: Large language model (LLM)-based multi-agent simulation offers a powerful testbed for studying social opinion dynamics. podcast: [How to give feedback that lands | Dr Renee St Jacques] Most managers give feedback. Few give feedback that actually works. Drawing on her background in psychology and executive coaching, Renee St Jacques breaks down what so many well-intentioned leaders get wrong — and introduces a three-part framework to help teams rebuild trust and perform at their best. Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.
